description: Render a labeled JPEG thumbnail grid of every slide in a .pptx for quick visual analysis. Each thumbnail is labeled with its XML filename (e.g. slide1.xml); hidden slides show a crossed-out placeholder. Read-only — the deck is not modified; grid image(s) land under record_store.
rules: read-only — never writes back to PPTX_FILE
requires soffice (LibreOffice) + pdftoppm (Poppler) + Pillow + defusedxml; degrades gracefully when any are absent
grid JPEG(s) are written under record_store (thumbnails.jpg, or thumbnails-1.jpg ... for large decks)
usage: Set PPTX_FILE (path to a .pptx). Output: thumbnails.jpg (grid) plus thumbnail.log (run output).
limitation: Needs LibreOffice + Poppler for rasterization. Grid is capped at 6 columns; very large decks split into multiple numbered grids.
